testcase.name: Python SDK generator > generates pyproject.toml with runtime dependency
Python SDK generator > generates dataclass payload with Decimal for number fields
Python SDK generator > generates async publish method using build_envelope
Python SDK generator > generates __init__.py with create_client factory
Python SDK generator > creates __init__.py in events subpackage
